creator: hsn@sendmail.cz
text:
i cant find kernel config command to directly compile module into kernel but after experiments i found that

options ZFS
options NFSD

builds working kernel.

there is nothing related to ZFS found in
/usr/src/sys/conf/NOTES

please add entry for "options ZFS" with note that about NFSD dependency.


 		 	   		  =
